backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining types (Cattle, CustomerAccount, CattleOrder, etc.) and CRUD operations for cattle, customers, and orders with role-based access control enforced via AccessControl/MixinAuthorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines old and new actor state shapes and a `run` function to transform legacy canister state (deliveries, milk records, old cattle) into the new schema (cattle, customerAccounts, orders).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (admin panel, customer portal, visual theme) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color tokens (background, foreground, sidebar, charts, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Dairy Business App that mounts the React app at `#root` and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with nine routes (dashboard, cattle, milk, inventory, customers, deliveries, reports, portal, admin), wrapped in QueryClientProvider and CustomerAuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminCattleManag: Admin UI component for managing cattle records with a table view and dialog forms for adding, editing, and deleting cattle, including availability and health status badges.
frontend/src/components/AdminCustomerMan: Admin UI component for managing customer accounts with a table view and dialog forms for adding, editing, deleting, and toggling active status of customers.
frontend/src/components/AdminOrdersDeliv: Admin UI component that displays all cattle orders in a table and provides a dialog to update order status and delivery notes.
frontend/src/components/CattleForm.tsx: Reusable form component for creating or editing a cattle record, handling fields like tag number, breed, purchase date, milking capacity, price, availability, and health status.
frontend/src/components/CattleHealthChar: Renders a donut pie chart visualizing the distribution of cattle health statuses (Healthy, Sick, Recovered) using Recharts.
frontend/src/components/CustomerDelivery: Displays a customer's order history in a table with order ID, cattle tag, date, status badge, and delivery notes, with empty and loading states.
frontend/src/components/CustomerFeedback: Stub component that renders nothing, kept to prevent import errors after the feedback feature was removed.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: Reusable form component for creating or editing a customer account, handling name, phone, address, username, password, and active status fields.
frontend/src/components/CustomerMyDelive: Displays a table of a customer's cattle orders with status badges, loading skeletons, and an empty state. Accepts orders array and isLoading props.
frontend/src/components/CustomerPlaceOrd: Provides a form for customers to place a cattle order by selecting available cattle and adding delivery notes, using React Query for data fetching and mutation.
frontend/src/components/DeliveryQuantity: Stub component that replaces a removed delivery chart, rendering a placeholder message to prevent import errors.
frontend/src/components/FlaggedFeedbackS: Stub component that renders nothing, replacing a removed flagged feedback section to prevent import errors.
frontend/src/components/InventoryForm.ts: Form component supporting both adding new inventory items and updating quantities for existing items, with category and unit selectors.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation links, and an Outlet for nested routes including admin and customer portal links.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionCh: Stub component replacing a removed milk production chart, rendering a placeholder message to prevent import errors.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionTr: Stub component replacing a removed milk production trend chart, rendering a placeholder message to prevent import errors.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Displays a static catalog of farm products (milk and dairy) grouped by category with pricing, descriptions, and popular badges.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name to complete profile setup, saving it via the actor and invalidating the profile query on success.
frontend/src/components/ResolveFeedbackD: Stub component that renders nothing, kept to prevent import errors from removed feedback dialog functionality.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppMessageM: Stub component that renders nothing, kept to prevent import errors from removed WhatsApp messaging functionality.
frontend/src/context/CustomerAuthContext: React context provider managing customer session state with sessionStorage persistence, exposing login/logout functions and authentication status.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for admin CRUD operations on cattle, customers, and orders, each using the actor and showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Hook that wraps the Clipboard API to copy text, tracking copied state and errors with an auto-reset delay.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerQueries.ts: Provides a mutation hook for customer login that calls the backend actor and maps LoginError variants to user-friendly error messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY AuthClient, exposing a context provider and hook with login/logout functions and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Re-exports admin and customer query hooks and provides a shared useIsAdmin hook that checks caller admin status via the actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH colors, and print media styles.
frontend/src/lib/localTypes.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for local TypeScript type definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page that handles Internet Identity login, verifies admin access via the actor, and renders tabbed management sections for cattle, customers, and orders.
frontend/src/pages/CattleManagement.tsx: Admin page for managing cattle records with a stats overview, table listing, and dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting cattle. Uses React Query hooks and displays a health status chart.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerManagement.ts: Admin page for managing customer accounts with search, active/inactive toggling, CSV export, and dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting customers.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerPortal.tsx: Customer-facing portal with a login form and, once authenticated, tabs for placing orders and viewing deliveries. Fetches and filters orders by the logged-in customer's ID.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard showing summary stat cards for cattle, customers, and orders, plus a cattle health chart and a recent orders list.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryReports.tsx: Admin page that wraps the AdminOrdersDeliveries component to display and manage all cattle orders and deliveries.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryManagement.t: Placeholder admin page indicating that inventory management has been removed from the current system version.
frontend/src/pages/MilkProduction.tsx: Placeholder admin page indicating that milk production tracking has been removed, directing users to Cattle Management for milking capacity data.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyReports.tsx: Admin page that groups all orders by month and displays per-month summaries with delivered, pending, and cancelled counts alongside individual order details.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Provides functions to export customers, cattle, and orders data to downloadable CSV files, plus legacy stub functions for removed record types.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining values across navigation.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappMessageFormat: Formats a WhatsApp delivery confirmation message for AO Farms and generates a wa.me URL with the encoded message for a given phone number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, an OKLCH-based color system (including farm, admin, sidebar, and chart tokens), border radii, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 3) for a Cattle & Customer Management System, documenting existing features, architectural notes, and known issues such as broken cattle/customer adding in the previous build.
